1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting municipality (use municipality geometry WKT from step 1)

3.description: get 200-year flomareal polygons intersecting municipality (gjentaksintervall=200, use municipality geometry WKT)

4.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

5.description: find parcels intersecting storm-flo polygons (teig ∩ stormflo)

6.description: from parcels that intersect stormflo, find those that also intersect flomareal (teig ∩ stormflo ∩ flom)

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid (unique parcels)

9.description: return top 10 parcels by teigid ascending

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(omrade) AS omrade_wkt FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, ST_AsText(ST_Multi(omrade)) AS omrade_wkt FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_AsText(omrade) AS omrade_wkt FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, kommunenummer, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' LIMIT 100;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
